description: Export sections of 3DEC models to UDEC models.

keywords.name: filename
keywords.description: Specify the name of the output file. This file is an assembly of UDEC commands.

keywords.name: origin
keywords.description: Specify the origin of the plane.

keywords.name: normal
keywords.description: Specify the normal of the plane.

keywords.name: dip
keywords.description: Specify the dip of the plane.

keywords.name: dip-direction
keywords.description: Specify the dip-direction of the plane.
